Bash(python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

# Test manifold imports
from manifolds import Lorentz, HypLinear, HypLayerNorm, HypActivation, HypDropout
print\('manifolds: OK'\)

# Test Lorentz manifold basic operations
import torch
manifold = Lorentz\(k=1.0\)
print\(f'Lorentz manifold created: k={manifold.k.item\(\)}'\)

# Test origin and basic operations
origin = manifold.origin\(5, 33\)  # 5 points, 33-dim \(32 spatial + 1 time\)
print\(f'Origin shape: {origin.shape}'\)

# Test expmap0 / logmap0 round-trip
u = torch.randn\(10, 33\) * 0.1
u[..., 0] = 0  # tangent vector at origin has 0 time component
p = manifold.expmap0\(u\)
print\(f'expmap0 output shape: {p.shape}'\)

u_back = manifold.logmap0\(p\)
roundtrip_error = \(u - u_back\).abs\(\).max\(\).item\(\)
print\(f'logmap0\(expmap0\(u\)\) roundtrip max error: {roundtrip_error:.6f}'\)

# Test mid_point
x = manifold.random_normal\(5, 33, std=0.5\)
mid = manifold.mid_point\(x\)
print\(f'mid_point output shape: {mid.shape}'\)

# Test square_dist
sq_d = manifold.square_dist\(x[:3], x[2:]\)
print\(f'square_dist output shape: {sq_d.shape}'\)

print\(\)
print\('All manifold tests passed!'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from factory_ext import create_hyp_encoder, create_hyp_objective, create_dual_optimizer

# Mock a PIDSMaker-like config object
class Obj:
    def __getattr__\(self, name\):
        return Obj\(\)

class MockCfg\(Obj\):
    pass

cfg = MockCfg\(\)
cfg.training = MockCfg\(\)
cfg.training.node_hid_dim = 64
cfg.training.node_out_dim = 32
cfg.training.lr = 0.0001
cfg.training.weight_decay = 0.00001
cfg.training.hyp_lr = 0.0001
cfg.training.hyp_weight_decay = 0.0
cfg.training.encoder = MockCfg\(\)
cfg.training.encoder.dropout = 0.3
cfg.training.encoder.used_methods = 'hyperbolic_transformer'
cfg.training.encoder.hyperbolic_transformer = MockCfg\(\)
cfg.training.encoder.hyperbolic_transformer.trans_num_layers = 2
cfg.training.encoder.hyperbolic_transformer.trans_num_heads = 4
cfg.training.encoder.hyperbolic_transformer.trans_dropout = 0.3
cfg.training.encoder.hyperbolic_transformer.gnn_num_layers = 2
cfg.training.encoder.hyperbolic_transformer.gnn_dropout = 0.3
cfg.training.encoder.hyperbolic_transformer.graph_weight = 0.5
cfg.training.encoder.hyperbolic_transformer.k = 1.0
cfg.training.encoder.hyperbolic_transformer.attention_type = 'linear_focused'
cfg.training.encoder.hyperbolic_transformer.power_k = 2
cfg.training.encoder.hyperbolic_transformer.use_bn = True
cfg.training.encoder.hyperbolic_transformer.use_residual = True

# Test encoder factory
encoder = create_hyp_encoder\(cfg, in_dim=128\)
print\(f'Encoder created: {type\(encoder\).__name__}'\)

# Test objective factory
objective = create_hyp_objective\(cfg, node_out_dim=32\)
print\(f'Objective created: {type\(objective\).__name__}'\)

# Test optimizer factory
import torch
opt = create_dual_optimizer\(cfg, encoder.parameters\(\)\)
print\(f'Optimizer created: {type\(opt\).__name__} with {len\(opt.optimizers\)} sub-optimizers'\)
print\(f'Param groups: {len\(opt.param_groups\)}'\)

# Quick forward pass
x = torch.randn\(20, 128\)
edge_index = torch.randint\(0, 20, \(2, 50\)\)
encoder.train\(\)
result = encoder\(x, edge_index\)
h = result['h']
h_src = h[edge_index[0]]
h_dst = h[edge_index[1]]
train_result = objective\(h_src, h_dst, inference=False\)
print\(f'Forward pass loss: {train_result[\\"loss\\"].item\(\):.6f}'\)

# Backward pass
opt.zero_grad\(\)
train_result['loss'].backward\(\)
opt.step\(\)
print\('Backward pass + optimizer step: OK'\)

print\(\)
print\('Factory extension tests PASSED!'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python -c "
import ast, os
myp = '/home/astar/projects/myproject'
for root, dirs, files in os.walk\(myp\):
    for f in sorted\(files\):
        if f.endswith\('.py'\):
            path = os.path.join\(root, f\)
            with open\(path\) as fh:
                tree = ast.parse\(fh.read\(\)\)
            classes = [n.name for n in ast.walk\(tree\) if isinstance\(n, ast.ClassDef\)]
            funcs = [n.name for n in ast.walk\(tree\) if isinstance\(n, ast.FunctionDef\) and not any\(isinstance\(p, ast.ClassDef\) for p in ast.walk\(tree\)\)]
            rel = os.path.relpath\(path, myp\)
            if classes:
                print\(f'{rel}: classes={classes}'\)
")
